kept.text:
10,000+ public companies in the U.S. can now tokenize their shares.

The world’s largest stock transfer agent, Computershare, is moving into tokenization through its partnership with Securitize.

That includes companies like Apple, Tesla, Microsoft, Nvidia, Disney, Coinbase and thousands more.

kept.text:
Securitize, Computershare Open Tokenization Path for Apple, Tesla, Nvidia and 25,000 stocks    

Securitize said it has reached an agreement with Computershare to support U.S.-listed clients in issuing equity securities in tokenized form. Issuers can add Issuer-Sponsored Tokens (ISTs) alongside traditional shares and DRS without changing their capital structure. ISTs represent actual shares in token form, not derivatives or wrappers, and are designed to fit within existing regulatory frameworks.
https://t.co/Y0SOgG95FP

kept.text:
JUST IN: Computershare Partners with Securitize to Enable Tokenized Shares for U.S.-Listed Companies

Computershare and Securitize have agreed to let U.S.-listed issuers offer Issuer-Sponsored Tokens (ISTs) — blockchain-based shares issued directly alongside traditional equity. These tokens grant holders the same full shareholder rights (voting, dividends, etc.) as conventional shares, with Computershare continuing as the transfer agent of record. The model focuses on direct on-chain issuance rather than derivative wrappers, aiming to improve efficiency while preserving existing regulatory and corporate frameworks.
